things.name: National Museum of Niger
things.description: World-class outdoor museum with dinosaur fossils, traditional crafts and a zoo

things.name: Grand Marche
things.description: West African market with Tuareg silverwork, leather goods and indigo cloth

things.name: Niger River Pirogue Cruise
things.description: Sunset boat on the Niger with hippos and pelicans

things.name: Agadez (Day Trip)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Tuareg city in the Sahara with the famous mud-brick minaret

things.name: Village Artisanal
things.description: Craft village with Tuareg silversmiths making the famous Agadez Cross pendants

things.name: Kennedy Bridge
things.description: Main bridge over the Niger river with views of the capital

things.name: Palais de Justice Cultural Events
things.description: Colonial courts building hosting festivals and cultural performances

things.name: Wadata Market
things.description: Traditional market in the Hausa quarter with kola nuts, dried goods and spices

things.name: Musee de la BCEAO
things.description: Economic history of the West African franc zone in a modern museum

things.name: Djerma Millet Porridge
things.description: Traditional Nigerien breakfast - millet porridge with sour milk and sugar
